sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_soundex (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, name, soundex(name) AS soundex_code FROM test_soundex;
UPDATE test_soundex SET name = 'aksell' WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, soundex(name) AS soundex_code FROM test_soundex WHERE soundex(name) = soundex('akcell');
